headline: Bombay HC strikes down ₹22,000-cr spectrum levy
body_head: The Bombay High Court on Monday struck down the Centre's 2012 decision to levy a retrospective charge of ₹22,000 crore on telecom operators for spectrum holdings beyond 6.2 MHz. The judgment is significant as it ends a long-drawn litigation. The court ruled that neither the telecom licences nor Sect

headline: Ceasefire faces its toughest test
subheadline: Iran, Israel trade strikes for 1st time since April; Trump plea leads to a halt
body_head: Iran and Israel said on Monday they had halted attacks on each other after an Israeli air strike on Iranian military facilities and Iran's subsequent missile strikes on Israel. The wave of attacks over 24 hours were the most direct clashes between Israel and Iran since an April ceasefire, threatenin

headline: India sees surprise current account surplus in Jan-Mar
body_head: The country is said to witness a 'balance of payments' surplus in FY25. The current account balance reached $7.1 billion (0.7% of GDP) in Q4FY24 from a surplus of $0.6 billion (0.06% of GDP) in Q3FY24. This was supported by strong net services receipts of $64.6 billion and remittances of $63.8 billi

headline: Tata Trusts meet skips contentious flashpoints
body_head: A meeting of the Sir Dorabji Tata Trust on Monday steered clear of the contentious issues confronting the Tata Group, focusing instead on routine business. headline: IndiGo expects FY27 growth in single digits
body_head: The country's largest airline IndiGo expects capacity growth to remain in single digits in FY27 as it deals with the challenges of Pratt & Whitney engine issues and a weak international market. headline: HDFC Bank legal review report likely in a week
body_head: An independent legal review commissioned by HDFC Bank following the abrupt resignation of Managing Director Aditya Chakraborty and Chief Executive Officer Sashidhar Jagadishan whose second tenure ends in October.
